Uses of Class
neqsim.process.automation.WriteValidationResult

Packages that use WriteValidationResult
Package
Description
neqsim.process.automation
Stable automation API for programmatic interaction with running NeqSim process simulations.

    Description
    static WriteValidationResult
    WriteValidationResult.fail(String code, String message)
    Creates a hard-failure validation result.

    Returns the validation result for this write; never null.

    Returns the shared OK instance.
    WriteValidationResult
    ProcessAutomation.setVariableValueValidated(String address, double value, String unitOfMeasure)
    Like ProcessAutomation.setVariableValue(String, double, String) but first runs the WriteValidatorRegistry against the proposed write.

    WriteValidationResult
    WriteValidator.validate(ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment, String propertyPath, double value, String unit)
    Validates a proposed write to the given equipment.
    WriteValidationResult
    WriteValidatorRegistry.validate(ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment, String propertyPath, double value, String unit)
    Runs every applicable validator against the proposed write.
    static WriteValidationResult
    WriteValidationResult.warn(String code, String message)
    Creates a soft-warning validation result.
